title: Vanguard (disambiguation)
content:
'''Vanguard''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''''[[Vanguard]]''''', an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served as the [[command ship]] of [[General]] [[Jan Dodonna]]'s [[Massassi Group]]
*The [[Vanguard (vehicle)|'''Vanguard''']], a ground vehicle utilized by the [[Jedi Order]]
*'''[[Vanguard armor regiment]]s''', an [[Imperial Army]] unit type
*'''[[Vanguard Squadron]]''', a [[New Republic]] [[starfighter]] [[squadron]]
**'''[[Vanguard Leader]]'''
**'''[[Vanguard One]]'''
**'''[[Vanguard Two]]'''
**'''[[Vanguard Three]]'''
**'''[[Vanguard Four]]'''
**'''[[Vanguard Five]]'''
*'''"[[Vanguard Five (pilot)|Vanguard Five]]"''', a [[pilot]] in the squadron
*'''[[Rebel Vanguard]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Starships===
*The '''[[Vanguard (Defender-class light corvette)|''Vanguard'']]''', a [[Defender-class light corvette/Legends|''Defender''-class light corvette]]
*The '''[[Vanguard (Imperial-class)|''Vanguard'']]''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]
*The '''[[Vanguard (Victory II-class)|''Vanguard'']]''', a [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]]
*The '''[[Vanguard (Warrior-class)|''Vanguard'']]''', a [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class gunship]]
*The '''''[[Vanguard Flare]]''''', a [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]]
*The '''''[[Vanguard's Blade]]''''', a [[Thranta-class corvette|''Thranta''-class corvette]]

===Ship classes===
*The [[Vanguard (starfighter)|'''Vanguard''']], a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] by [[Corellia StarDrive]]
*The '''[[TIE Vanguard]]''', a [[TIE Series|TIE series]] variant
*The '''[[Vanguard-class heavy assault gunship|''Vanguard''-class heavy assault gunship]]'''
*'''[[Vanguard picket]]s'''

===Military units===
*'''[[Rebel vanguard division]]'''
*'''[[Vanguard (droid army)|Vanguard]]''', a unit within the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]
*'''[[Vanguard armor regiment/Legends|Vanguard armor regiments]]'''
*'''[[Vanguard Squadron (Hapes)|Vanguard Squadron]]''', a [[Hapan]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Vanguard Outpost]]''', a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] outpost on [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]]
*'''[[Vanguard Station]]''', a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Empire [[Space station/Legends|space station]]

===Armor===
*The '''[[TT-15B Vanguard]]''', a model of [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]]
*The '''[[TT-17A Elite Vanguard]]''', a model of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]]

===Other===
*The '''[[V3 Vanguard hold-out blaster]]'''
*The '''[[Vanguard advanced training program]]'''
*The '''[[Vanguard c20 retrofit suite]]'''
*The '''[[Vanguard probot]]''', a model of [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]]

==Real world==
*"'''[[The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard]]'''", a short story by [[Robert Chestney]]
